name: JoinFilms Show Time
overview: JoinFilms Show Time is an Indian, Hindi-Language Realty Show event directed by Virendra Rathore for his practical film academy named JoinFilms Acting Institute based in Mumbai. Shivam Roy Prabhakar hosted the realty-show event. The show stars Piyush Shrivastav, Nikhat Khatoon, Padam Singh Gulia, Pratiksha Meghraj Pagare and Souptik Bhattacharjee

trailers.title: JoinFilms Academy promoted their students by JoinFilms Show Time Chapter 1
